title: AI Engineering for Web Developers
description: Build real AI-powered features using LLM APIs, embeddings, RAG, and agents. A hands-on course for web developers ready to add AI to their toolkit, with a build project in every module.

modules.title: LLM Fundamentals
modules.project: Model Showdown -- compare LLM outputs side-by-side

modules.title: Prompt Engineering
modules.project: Prompt Lab -- evaluate prompt variants with a test harness

modules.title: OpenAI API Deep Dive
modules.project: AI Code Reviewer -- streaming review with function calling

modules.title: Anthropic API & Claude
modules.project: Doc Analyzer -- extract structured data from long documents

modules.title: Building AI Features in Web Apps
modules.project: AI Chat Widget -- full-stack streaming chat component

modules.title: Embeddings & Vector Databases
modules.project: Smart Bookmark Search -- semantic search for your notes

modules.title: RAG from Scratch
modules.project: Ask My Docs -- RAG Q&A bot with citations

modules.title: AI Agents
modules.project: Research Agent -- autonomous web research with ReAct

modules.title: Full-Stack AI App (Capstone)
modules.project: AI Knowledge Base -- the full capstone build

author: We Build Black
